question:
I just opened a PR bumping Megatron-LM's dev base image. One functional test still hangs after the bump and I do not want to block the bump on fixing it. According to the bump-base-image skill: (a) which GitHub PR label do I attach to the bump PR to unlock the full functional test matrix, and (b) given that the skill says NOT to delete the test_case entry, what is the exact replacement YAML line for an entry whose scope currently reads `scope: [mr-github]`? Reply with exactly these two lines and nothing else (preserve YAML list brackets in line 2):
Label: <text>
Scope line: <full YAML line>
ground_truth:
Label: Run functional tests
Scope line: scope: [mr-github-broken]
expected_behavior: Names the 'Run functional tests' PR label to unlock the full functional matrix
Replaces scope: [mr-github] with scope: [mr-github-broken] (does not delete the test_case)
